title: cadaba trifoliata
intro: Cadaba trifoliata, also known as the thorny calotropis, is a plant species that belongs to the Capparaceae family. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cadaba trifoliata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, digestive issues, and skin problems, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Cadaba trifoliata include infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
